location.name: Maimunarnika
location.description: The legendary open-air bar in Borisova Gradina — beer under the trees, a stage in the middle of the park, and the whole summer evening around it.
location.directions: Inside Borisova Gradina park. Easiest on foot from the Eagles' Bridge entrance.

about.intro: The event was organized by the Bulgarian Java User Group, Codexio and random beer fans from Bulgaria. There was an agenda before the event, but everyone could go to the stage and talk if desired. Stand-up-like talks instead of deep technical ones — to keep the attendees' attention where it belongs.

highlights.title: Beer (and wine!)
highlights.text: Don't drink beer? No problem — there was wine as well, and even french fries… or were they belgian? 🤔

highlights.title: Open mic energy
highlights.text: Lightning talks and open-mic slots — sponsors could hop on stage for a welcome or cheers at the same time.

highlights.title: Free for everyone
highlights.text: Free entrance, optional registration. Last-minute friends explicitly included.

highlights.title: Raffle & gifts
highlights.text: Sponsors came to the stage with gifts and closing words before the evening wound down.

schedule.title: Opening
schedule.abstract: Welcome talk by Bulgarian Java User Group and friends*.

schedule.title: Lightning talks
schedule.abstract: Open Mic talks — you could come to the stage and talk about everything.

schedule.title: Welcome and cheers!
schedule.abstract: Yes, at the same time every sponsor could also come to the stage and say welcome or cheers.

schedule.title: Open Mic continues
schedule.abstract: If you are drunk or have superpowers you have the opportunity to give a speech, tell a story or give a toast!

schedule.title: Raffle & Gifts
schedule.abstract: Our sponsors could come and give some gifts or say some closing words.

schedule.title: JUG drunk talks?
schedule.abstract: Bulgarian Java User Group leaders could say some drunk talks & try to close the event.

schedule.title: Still here?
schedule.abstract: Are you still here? You should be pretty drunk already so why do you even care about the agenda?

schedule.title: No hope
schedule.abstract: At that point we don't know if Maimunarnika is even working — I expect the lights to turn off. Go home, no more java and/or beer for you tonight!

schedule.title: Return of the hunger!
schedule.abstract: Like a young jedi somehow you survived the alcohol and are looking for food. I guess DIVAKA is an option in Sofia still at that hour. Probably some people went there a lot earlier — you can try to join or just go solo, han solo.
